{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323035603B51CE22739C9F4140EAE"}"},"total":4},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7541752474940490558","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"挺好看的，前期还挺吸引人的，推荐大家去看"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1755954369,"group_id":"7512140129918536729","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzneVskl614BSVURsgwdTc8Tl13Wsu0Xv3COT4HUjUYf","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787248&x-signature=NtetCP%2BD2YPkYr6bl%2BJMa04hBGU%3D","user_id":"4240136947430807","user_name":"nunu的麒麟"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4240136947430807","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7512140129918536729","book_info":{"abstract":"林万绔，一个在病榻上熬干生命的植物人，睁眼却成了异界最惨亡灵学徒——莱恩·莫斯。重伤濒死，被导师当作诱饵抛弃在魔物森林边缘，光耀教会的净化圣光近在咫尺！
绝境之中，残破灵魂绑定的【第四天灾服务器】终于激活！
什么？召唤玩家？可能量枯竭，召唤来的只有三具白板骷髅？
等等…那个徒手掰狼嘴当瓶塞的是谁？那个把狼尸变方块的又是哪位？还有那个用脸接圣光做实验的疯子博士？！
看着这群骨骼清奇、操作离谱的“天灾玩家”，林万绔的亡灵法师生涯彻底跑偏：
轮椅战神沉迷骸骨坐骑飙车拆迁？MC老哥用骨灰拌水泥搞基建？科学狂魔博士只剩头骨还在追着圣骑士做活体实验？花痴兵王一边高效猎杀一边点评魔物颜值？
而林万绔自己？一边哆嗦着修补法袍，一边心惊胆战地看着玩家们用荧光毒菇当诱饵，策划着把教会大军喂给沼泽巨蜥…
“说好的亡灵天灾呢？怎么感觉我才是被天灾的那个？！”林万绔看着玩家们兴高采烈建起的白骨哨塔、骷髅牌挖掘机，以及远方地平线压来的审判所圣焰，陷入了深深的灵魂拷问。
当沙雕玩家撞上硬核异界，亡灵法爷的骨生信条只剩一条：抱紧天灾大腿，搞基建，活下去！（顺便抢救一下所剩无几的节操？）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o74d392e0cc70163ccd940c60b6e4238a~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"门外人","author_id":"","book_id":"7512140129918536729","book_name":"我，亡灵法爷，召唤天灾搞基建","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1141,"name":"西方奇幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1141&name=西方奇幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":6,"name":"奇幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=6&name=奇幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":855,"name":"第四天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=855&name=第四天灾&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7520988532496663065","read_count":"22","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"155491"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"72","tags":"西方奇幻,奇幻,玄幻,穿越,奇幻仙侠,第四天灾","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o74d392e0cc70163ccd940c60b6e4238a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779393363&x-signature=ua0mtCeJjwu3y0FQC3MSj%2BNAuJA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3658782011818888","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"7"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323035603B51CE22739C9F4140EAE"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读
